text: MITRE ATT&CK identifies AcidRain as an ELF binary targeting modems and routers using MIPS architecture and associates it with the ViaSat KA-SAT communication outage during the initial phase of Russia's 2022 full-scale invasion of Ukraine. MITRE maps AcidRain to File and Directory Discovery, Data Destruction, Disk Wipe: Disk Content Wipe, and System Shutdown/Reboot.
